decisions.title_en: G7 Evian summit opens with AI dominant; allies split over AI sovereignty
decisions.reason: Previously published on 06-12 as a preview ('three lab CEOs will attend'). New on 06-15: the summit actually convenes (June 15-17), the tech-CEO roster expanded well beyond the three labs (Mensch, Gomez, Rombach, Benioff, Alex Wang, Ito, etc.), a Wednesday tech working lunch on AI infra/regulation is scheduled, and the dominant new framing is an openly widening US-EU-Canada rift over AI sovereignty with governance language expected to be 'watered down' and the US opposing multilateral rules.

decisions.title_en: Ramp June AI Index: Anthropic 41% vs OpenAI 39.5% — Claude now the enterprise default
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. The June 2026 Ramp AI Index (real corporate-card/invoice spend across 50k+ US firms) shows Anthropic rising 2.5pts to 41% while OpenAI slips 0.1pt to 39.5% — Anthropic now the most-adopted paid AI in US enterprise, a fresh monthly data release widening the lead first reported in May.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot open-sources Kimi K2.7-Code (1T MoE coding model) under Modified MIT
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. New open-weights coding-focused model: 1T total / 32B active MoE, weights on Hugging Face under Modified MIT, +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2 and ~30% fewer reasoning tokens vs K2.6.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI quietly retires GPT-5.2, auto-migrates everyone to GPT-5.5
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. OpenAI discontinued GPT-5.2 Instant/Thinking/Pro with no splashy announcement; existing chats auto-continue on the matching GPT-5.5 model. Developers must re-test prompts/parsing and pin model versions.

decisions.title_en: Italy's CINECA activates IQM 54-qubit Radiance, integrated with Leonardo supercomputer
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. CINECA brings IQM's 54-qubit Radiance quantum computer online integrated with the Leonardo supercomputer for hybrid classical-quantum HPC/AI workflows.
